body:

| | **FIRST:** Sheriff Joe Arpaio told fellow Republicans at a local event that he's desperate to "go after Sinema."

name: Sydney Watnick, Break the Majority
subject: This just got real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a7d/2fde7c66/46f3ff8a/15682a78/2695758479/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/supremect?gpsid=14_43_1615&refcode=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
This just got real, friend.

We got news today that Anthony Kennedy is retiring from the Supreme Court -- meaning Donald Trump will get to replace Kennedy's critical swing vote with a much more right-wing judge.

With this conservative shift in the courts, it just became even more important that we break the Republican supermajority in November.

We need a legislature that is committed to protecting women's health. We need a legislature willing to fight for our right to vote. We need a legislature that will protect our clean air and water.

**[The stakes for November could not be higher. We're fighting to Break the Majority and we need you with us. Chip in today to help us put more organizers on the ground in swing districts across the state.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a7d/2fde7c66/46f3ff8a/15682a7b/2695758479/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/supremect?gpsid=14_43_1615&refcode=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+The+stakes+for+November+could+not+be+hig")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a7d/2fde7c66/46f3ff8a/15682a7a/2695758479/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/supremect?gpsid=14_43_1615&refcode=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-++ask++raquo")

name: Team Ryan
subject: Justice Kennedy is retiring. Here's how we take back the Senate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Republicans hold a two-seat majority in the Senate. Three of our best chances to pick up Senate seats in November are in Arizona, Nevada, and Texas. | |
---
Folks, The lone swing vote on the United States Supreme Court, Justice Anthony Kennedy, just announced his retirement. **The stakes for Democratic control of the Senate have never been higher. EVERYTHING -- from health care to voting rights to reproductive freedom -- is on the line.** Republicans hold a two-seat majority in the Senate. Three of our best chances to pick up Senate seats in November are in Arizona, Nevada, and Texas. [Donate now to Democratic Senate nominees Jacky Rosen (Nevada), Beto O'Rourke (Texas), and the eventual Arizona nominee and support our efforts to take back both Houses of # Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Tina Smith
subject: They rewrote the rules and stole it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
If there was any doubt about how important it was to win back the Senate -- that is gone. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bea5/c1f7015/6bf28d09/1142e3a3/837040138/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june-supreme_court?refcode=rtw_20180627_em") Friends- **Republicans rewrote the rules and stole one Supreme Court seat in 2016 when they denied a vote to Merrick Garland.** Now, with the sudden retirement of Justice Kennedy today, they are looking to take another. If Mitch McConnell gets his wish and confirms another Justice, we are facing a Supreme Court that could overturn _Roe vs. Wade_ , marriage equality, restrict voting rights, and hand even more power to corporate special interests. **If there was any doubt about how important it was to win back the Senate -- that is gone. We must use every ounce of our energy to ensure Democrats have a majority to put a firm check on Trump and the right-wing attacks on our values that are sure to come.** **[Make a contribution of $5 to my campaign before our FEC deadline and ensure we have the resources to keep this seat in Democratic hands in 2018. Only if we take back the Senate can we put a stop to the damage this generational change in the Supreme Court could have.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bea5/c1f7015/6bf28d09/1142e3a4/837040138/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june-supreme_court?refcode=rtw_20180627_em-nd")** This has been a long week, and the Supreme Court has handed down rulings which have cut us to our core -- but I'm not giving up. I'm lacing up my Chuck Taylors and getting ready to fight back even harder. Let's go, Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bea5/c1f7015/6bf28d09/1142e3a6/837040138/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june-supreme_court?refcode=rtw_20180627_em-nd&amount=25")**
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bea5/c1f7015/6bf28d09/1142e3b8/837040138/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

St. Paul, MN 55114

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Unhinged
body:
Unhinged No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Unhinged](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Left seems to be coming unhinged. So many have apparently been afflicted with Trump derangement syndrome, that a lot of them will say just about anything. This has been going on since President Trump was elected, but it seems to be getting worse. This week I'm looking at just the latest examples in my blog. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [America First?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-d/)
There are basically two schools of thought on whether President Trump's "America First" strategy is the way to go. I'm discussing both in my blog this week and giving you my opinion on the strategy. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Here's My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it's worth)](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-u/)
For the last year and a half or so, President Trump's critics have been warning that he was going to trigger World War III by his overly aggressive tactics towards North Korea. Then, surprising nearly everyone, President Trump and Kim Jong Un agreed to meet this week. So I'm blogging this week on my thoughts about where they go from here. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-n/)
We've been hearing an awful lot about the coming "blue wave". But while The Left and their friends in the media talk about it, Republicans in Congress along with the President have been getting real things done for the American people. Which leads me to wonder, could this actually be a pretty good year for Republicans? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-p/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-m/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-c/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjlizty-kujkulhluu-a/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

subject: Barn Dance this Thursday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | Don't miss out on the fun! Be sure to join the Shedd for Congress team tomorrow, June 28! Hey Friend, Don't miss out on the fun! name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: 9 of our women WON last night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c414c/24c69fd9/19419267c/1883e3d2/3441713484/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact")
---

Peter,

Here's some good news: Nine of our candidates on the ballot yesterday in Colorado, Maryland, and New York won.

They join our 111+ women who have already made it through their primaries this year.

Here's a breakdown of our primary election wins so far:
* **House:** 29 wins -- including 20 in red-to-blue races!

* **Governor:** Four wins -- including Stacey Abrams getting one step closer to becoming the first black woman governor in the nation.

* **State & Local:** 85+ wins -- including candidates for state legislature; lieutenant governor; secretary of state; county executive; mayor; city councilmember; state's and district attorneys; state treasurer and controller; and land, labor, and public service commissioners.

All of these wins were made possible by the strength of our candidates but also by the unwavering support of this community.

If we keep up this momentum, I know we can help these women -- and all of our endorsed candidates -- keep winning their primaries and defeat Republicans in November.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal to keep our winning momentum going:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-June-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c414c/24c69fd9/19419267c/1883e3d3/3441713484/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJuneGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c414c/24c69fd9/19419267c/1883e3cc/3441713484/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact&source=WQEFER66N_digital_email_20180627_EOQElectionReport_inact")

|

name: James Carville
subject: Give ‘em hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QV3rgMhZjXXGCZTtqsVYR6qyc9hDnmVwgMtQRhBLHZ0=/eg5cjSnXdqxE3a2IozZXlzFUNXrn0YG-2LNbSI0e0P0=?gpsid=13_36_1649&refcode=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

Paul Davis never gives up -- not as a member of the Kansas legislature, and not now, as a candidate for Congress.

It's why folks have had his back for so many years, and it's why I have his back now. But if he's going to fight for folks like you and me in Congress, he needs our help before this major end-of-quarter deadline.

**[If you're ready to change the way things work in Washington, it's time to throw your hat in with Paul. Chip in before this deadline passes us by.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QV3rgMhZjXXGCZTtqsVYR6qyc9hDnmVwgMtQRhBLHZ0=/eg5cjSnXdqxE3a2IozZXlzFUNXrn0YG-2LNbSI0e0P0=?gpsid=13_36_1649&refcode=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

We already know that Paul Ryan and other Republican allies are gearing up for a fight in this race -- heck, they already pledged to spend millions of dollars trying to take down Paul Davis.

It's up to us to give 'em hell. **[Chip in now to show anyone who's watching that Paul's got a great team behind him, and we ain't stopping any time soon.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QV3rgMhZjXXGCZTtqsVYR6qyc9hDnmVwgMtQRhBLHZ0=/eg5cjSnXdqxE3a2IozZXlzFUNXrn0YG-2LNbSI0e0P0=?gpsid=13_36_1649&refcode=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ3_fnd_gq_ful__JC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Here we go,

James Carville

Lawrence KS 66044 United States

name: Mike Pence
subject: The truth --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s the one thing we have that they don’t. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2eab0d270d779ad0bd2b52b9df4819b13ce9bd4663340b6b4dd7058c7af370cdd05dc88cb6e33924c5065686c1a6499f9a)
---

Friend,

Democrats may have a media machine that can parrot its talking points 24/7, **but we have the TRUTH on our side.**

No one can argue with an agenda that secures our border, brings back our jobs, and fearlessly calls our enemy by its name -- radical Islamic terrorism.

**But getting the truth past the liberal media filter takes a lot of work, and the President and I need your help to get it done.**
---
| **[With the critical, mandated June FEC end-of-quarter deadline coming up, can I count on you to step up with a contribution of just $1?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2eb8a8fbe4c592fccdbe7ae8508a960d921156e14462bdc29764ce7c1097f9a51d7fcaa760ea738ef28bd8efbd4bd34e7c)**
[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2e4034651f83a6c24677302e053dce837ae77aa1dd5fd1d8973f712d853f657b8c5a25dec7ad54ed17fdc205a728ccb955) ** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2e5862781ae0336bf15abd262626ef890e4073a56a7a8d41d1ffa62318c281bdaed06a52b51b6ede5a041884460aafa4bc)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2efabd7fa2c31534a16a3de7dc2ac595109381dfbb6e94798384cf981772eb3e3e2d2a475d01dc6954846f8230542eb5f6)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2e6d292f53ee880430d6ab1a5e2f5a27a76d9d292ba5ca006ca2d4b5278025647b023554e5cbea6e666fa6acb4338c91c6)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d8a09157b475c2e7ddc4da5f5568e45af3e7e9ed390b86f0b3c20a70977bc0d560446474e913654457c1d066ee21fa98eb8cb7b0eea25a2)**
More and more Americans are saying they approve of our agenda to Make America Great Again for one simple reason...

...They see firsthand the actual results of our agenda.

The economy is growing. Jobs are coming back. The Supreme Court is ruling in favor of America. Paychecks are rising. Manufacturing is experiencing an American revival. Optimism in our future is soaring.
As I said at CPAC, "America is back."

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Ratings Change!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I have some exciting news to share, Peter...

**The 7th district is now designated as a toss up!**

Last night, we learned that Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball officially upgraded our race for the third time, meaning since November 2017, we have moved this race all the way from "Safe Republican" to "Toss Up!"
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/_prUM7NX-HLamqU9CuMjl5RK9R24swisRYp7pZEBw6M=?refcode=sabato62818)
When I first announced my candidacy, everyone assumed the 7th was unwinnable, and that November would mark yet another win for the opposing party. Since then, we've won the Democratic primary with 73% of the vote. We've outraised our opponent, earned prominent endorsements, and taken our message of common sense leadership directly to voters. Now one of Virginia's most prominent political minds has acknowledged what we've known all along: Our grassroots campaign can and will make history by flipping the 7th district. [**Will you support our efforts today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/_prUM7NX-HLamqU9CuMjl5RK9R24swisRYp7pZEBw6M=?refcode=sabato62818)

This ratings change echoes what we've been seeing and hearing on the ground for the last six months -- in conversations on doorsteps, and on phone calls with citizens who want stronger, more thoughtful representation in Washington. The voters are ready for new leadership that is accountable, accessible, and available.

This is our moment, and you can help us spread the exciting news.

**[Click here to show your support by Saturday's crucial end of quarter fundraising deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/_prUM7NX-HLamqU9CuMjl5RK9R24swisRYp7pZEBw6M=?refcode=sabato62818)** Whether you contribute $5 or $50 (What better way to celebrate being labeled a 50/50 district?), you can make sure as many people as possible -- in the 7th and nationwide -- hear about the incredible momentum we're building.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/_prUM7NX-HLamqU9CuMjl5RK9R24swisRYp7pZEBw6M=?refcode=sabato62818)
Thank you for being a part of #TeamSpanberger. Let's win this thing.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/pSMVfqL6fwJG1I87yBkkTpRaBMiMHzGPI1p9x1Xw9MY=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oso0pzr1NMUQh3Id-481WdZwgYY5J-uLZzY_dfETj78=/nFivR22nAO1sz9IT6JCx7n30eFGuQooK2uV5REW5qSA=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: The White House
subject: Justice Kennedy, in President Trump’s words
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ca5ed28d0925e0d5eb2ce31421584a2cd36ba55093db79af30de15197ba4bbbfe873ced7117cd322de8ee4337e88411e96e2193b4cc482c

The White House - June 28, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump will participate in the groundbreaking of a new Foxconn plant that will bring 15,000 jobs to Mt. Pleasant, Wisconsin.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ca5ed28d0925e0d940a8fe3879b5f61b3a0b40d895cb0e9e972d3c503a4a7a3803dbdda4236cf919b62c8494fdf688c02706e8bdfb79723
Watch live at 1:25 p.m. ET.

Justice Kennedy, in President Trump's words

Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy, appointed by President Reagan more than three decades ago, announced yesterday that he will retire from the bench next month. Justice Kennedy has been a tireless voice for individual rights and the Founders' vision of limited government.

"He is a man that I've known for a long time and a man that I've respected for a long time. He's been a great justice of the Supreme Court. He is a man who is displaying great vision," President Trump said, thanking Justice Kennedy for his many years of service. "We will begin our search for a new justice of the United States Supreme Court. That will begin immediately."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ca5ed28d0925e0dd83a524d9b6168fc72224a3136106d3a6ba3a3ad9f26fe7c8ac996143a9c6c3d31a95c920818865c260a2cdce3728bb4
Read President Trump's statement on Justice Kennedy's retirement.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=26985a620368022eada0fe3dc3a9151ef8c01c094d948dab9044e5797997b3d27abc7805a4fbb1da95c5f530c5aadea6e3c763b812e863d2
President Trump speaks about Justice Kennedy before a bilateral meeting with President Rebelo de Sousa of Portugal.

Robert Wilkie is the right choice for our veterans

The Senate held its confirmation hearing yesterday for Lt. Colonel Robert Wilkie, President Trump's choice to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). Under Wilkie's leadership as Acting Secretary, the VA worked with Congress to pass the VA MISSION Act, making it easier for our veterans to obtain care and opening up the VA Caregiver Program to pre-9/11 veterans.

Wilkie has devoted decades of service to the Nation, both as a member of the military and as a government employee. The son of a wounded combat soldier, he understands the crucial role the VA plays for America's veterans and their families. "We are confident that Wilkie, a veteran of both the U.S. Navy and U.S. Air Force, has the credentials and experience to lead the second largest government agency," Vietnam Veterans of America says.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=26985a620368022ef64c46e1814fe7e8c90f4191559895e6b5b0b2c51f07b2c71c1619eacf066e4b24289b08d404d024f10528139aebe478
Learn more about why Robert Wilkie is the right choice for veterans.

Video of the day: The President's message to America's future

More than 100 young Americans joined President Trump yesterday for a discussion about key issues facing our country. "Each of you represent the future of this nation. You aren't afraid to speak the truth and the truth as you know it, and to stand up for what you know is right, even if it means being politically incorrect on occasion," the President said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=26985a620368022e4eddb03235bde5fa05b68ba58003b97c74e46779a3f73669c8b4af887c9901670e48b6c9b13fea2ca6bc3b2779d342c5
Watch President Trump's keynote at "A Conversation with America's Future."

Photo of the Day

Official White House Photo by Amy Rossetti

President Donald J. Trump: A Conversation With America's Future
| June 27, 2018

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=26985a620368022ed7165a93873b40cc1513f62b6f35588986d58cb6e00830cdfdadb1c3489f8f85690acb43b4abf1d878b5ca4292c332f3
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=26985a620368022e6c872718c1cd22f9080bf8f4ccb1632c9b640d327a7382d56a768080343757b382a073789c61592c62bda9c91524c439
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4b099e84da8ce888c97ee8feba605c17363cedb813e43b6302c0ff90be43974e32ec02f3daeade237736087604faed22aee14f34c207681d2
Unsubscribe

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: why I’m fighting for Jessica Morse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_logo)
Team, I'm carving out time to send this quick note because there's so much at stake in this election. If we're going to get this country back on track, we need to flip districts like California's 4th and elect more public servants like Jessica Morse.
**Jessica Morse is a candidate I believe in, because she 's not afraid to fight for working people.** She's committed to listening to the real problems facing Americans, and she's centered her campaign around a vision of accessible, high-quality health care, affordable higher education, and an economy that benefits everyday Americans--not just the special interests.
**I can 't wait to fight alongside Jessica in Congress. Saturday's quarterly fundraising deadline is about laying the groundwork for victory in November, and Jessica needs her supporters to step up. Can you chip in now to help?**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_25&amount=25)
---|---

[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_other)

Jessica's opponent in this race is a Republican whose record shows that he's there to serve special interests, not his constituents.
Last winter, he voted to give billionaires and lobbyists a trillion-dollar tax cut, blowing a hole in the budget that Republicans want to fill by gutting Medicare and Social Security. He's also voted to strip health care from millions of Americans of all ages--including almost 300,000 of his own constituents with pre-existing conditions.
**That 's not public service. That's a knife in the back of working families across California and across our nation.** Fighting back starts with electing independent leaders and true public servants like Jessica Morse to Congress.
The other side will do absolutely all they can to keep seats like this one--we're seeing that play out across the country. The best way to make sure Jessica can fight back is to help her team hit this vital fundraising goal.
[_**Can you chip in now to help the team pull it off?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_l1)
Thank you,
Elizabeth Warren
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bgsDZ2A239ep8mMWsALl8oYcfZKaiPQGApRxH1Ar9j8=/S3tO4uQwdpdywfkw2JtIPzLWMCrMWJPPmPiOPdNXRgY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180628_EW_jmeoq1_all_contribbutton)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: This is a disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is not a drill: As of yesterday, the future of Roe v. Wade is on the line this November.
News just broke that Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring from the Supreme Court - giving Donald Trump the opportunity to appoint an anti-choice, anti-women extremist to the highest court in the land and alter it for _decades_ to come.
If you care about a woman's right to choose, then I need you to stand up and fight back now. The only way to stop this disaster is by flipping the Senate blue - and to do that, we need to hold every single Democratic seat.
I'll never stop fighting for women's rights, but I can't do it alone. **I need to raise another $8,551 by midnight, but right now, we 're coming up short - **[so I'm counting on you to give $5 now to help me protect the future of the Supreme Court and women's right to choose:](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)****
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4aJ72o1vr3GCvJbbqiZjysocFbwRytM6&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Friends -

Our biggest FEC fundraising deadline of 2018 is just days away! And with _POLITICO_ reporting that our race will be "**one of the nation's marquee Senate races,** " we absolutely must hit this goal.

That's why a group of generous donors recently stepped up and offered to match every gift we receive this week, **but even with this help, we are still falling short - and time is running out.**

name: Harry Reid
subject: A proven fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
There is _nothing_ more important for Democrats this year than taking back the Senate majority - and the only way we can do that is by winning here in Nevada.
**But team, we just received the news that Jacky is basically tied with Dean Heller. If Jacky wins, Nevada wins.**
A Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC is promising to spend at least $11.2 million to help Republicans keep this seat - and the Senate majority. The future of our country is riding on you.
If Jacky loses this fall, Senate Republicans will have free rein to defund Planned Parenthood, attack Americans' health care and send more anti-everything ultraconservatives to the Supreme Court.
**We can't let this happen. That's why I told Jacky I'd help her raise the $10,000 she needs by midnight to keep Nevada blue and take back the United States Senate for Democrats.**
**[But with just hours to go, we're still falling short, so I need to ask: Please, can you give $5 by midnight for a better Nevada?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d1/4fbb2af3/7e3453fb/5e8bcdbb/2536526545/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azYwNy1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk607-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Jacky Rosen combines compassion with tenacity. She's proven that as a member of the United States Congress, working late nights and long weeks to make sure our voices are heard in Washington.
She's a proven fighter. And she's the leader that Nevada needs.
But team, the only way she'll be able to stay competitive is if grassroots donors like you are committed to this fight. **[So I'm counting on you to give $5 before our midnight deadline to help flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d1/4fbb2af3/7e3453fb/5e8bcdbb/2536526545/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azYwNy1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk607-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: September or October could be too late, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
There is simply too much at stake this year for us to sit back until November -- and your support will make it possible for the Democratic Party to invest directly in grassroots organizing.
---
The absolute truth is this: We can't afford to wait until the fall to start helping Democrats win in all 50 states. We have to start right now. The investments we make now will determine how strong our party's infrastructure is in the weeks and months ahead.

**Saturday at midnight marks a critical FEC deadline, which is why I'm asking: Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 right now to help Democratic candidates organize and win?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe087d/3034820411/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe087a/3034820411/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe087b/3034820411/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe0878/3034820411/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe0879/3034820411/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe0806/3034820411/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")
** The shameful and inhumane policies of this administration and Republican-led Congress have made it crystal clear that we cannot wait until the fall to start fighting back -- especially with an open Supreme Court seat. We need to be doing everything we possibly can right now to make sure that Democratic candidates across the country have the resources they need to fight competitively for every seat and every vote.

**There is simply too much at stake this year for us to sit back until November -- and your support will make it possible for the Democratic Party to invest directly in grassroots organizing across the country to fight back and win elections.**

**[Can you make a $3 contribution before Saturday's deadline to support these critical organizing efforts? Your donation makes a world of difference in this fight.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe0807/3034820411/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+%0ACan+you+make+a+if+consinConsGroup29422+&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")**

All my best,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political & Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. What we do now will determine how much we can compete in the fall. Don't wait to step up -- **[if you're able, make a $3 contribution before Saturday's deadline.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212bb/4067b0a/667cc1832/7fbe0804/3034820411/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+if+youre+able+make+a+if+consinConsGroup2&utm_campaign=em_20180628_abl_nd&source=em_20180628_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180628_abl_nd")**

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What happens next for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
My campaign has a big fundraising deadline coming up at the end of this week — our end of quarter deadline. It’s important because, after Saturday, we’ll be reporting how much support we’re getting in this campaign.
For most campaigns, they’ll do whatever it takes to raise as much money as they can ahead of these deadlines. Sometimes that means scary subject lines and all-caps text.
But we’re not like most campaigns. Before asking for your support, [**I always take a moment to explain why your donations of $5 or more really are so important for these deadlines.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1516647/8177252/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZkYjkwMy1mOTdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doNheDHsdXNV8OGbssGN8CcFgnXMdjL2ov2Ohs-bRGI=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
Washington is broken — I know that’s not news to you. But right now, across our state, Tennesseans of every background are coming together in the hopes of fixing it.
While Washington politicians keep trying to make this race about their partisan games, the Tennesseans I’ve been talking to on the campaign trail are making it clear that what they want in their next U.S. Senator is someone who can bring people together to get things done.
But this race is going to be tough in this era of “us” vs. “them” politics. We need help from grassroots supporters like you to get our message out and keep this race focused on the issues that affect our communities every day. **That’s why I’m asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us reach our end of quarter fundraising goal? Your support is going to be what makes the difference in this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1516648/8177253/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZkYjkwMy1mOTdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doNheDHsdXNV8OGbssGN8CcFgnXMdjL2ov2Ohs-bRGI=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1516649/8177254/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZkYjkwMy1mOTdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doNheDHsdXNV8OGbssGN8CcFgnXMdjL2ov2Ohs-bRGI=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**
We need something better than the hyper-partisan bickering we’re getting from Washington. And we need solutions to the very real problems facing communities across our state.
That’s why I’m applying for the job.
—Phil
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1516650/8177255/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZkYjkwMy1mOTdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=doNheDHsdXNV8OGbssGN8CcFgnXMdjL2ov2Ohs-bRGI=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The retirement of Justice Kennedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek -

Yesterday, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement from the Supreme Court - and what happens next will affect each and every one of us.

To me, it's clear. In 2016, the Republican Senate leadership established a precedent when it refused to take up the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Merrick Garland: **Do not fill a Supreme Court vacancy in an election year.**

It is only fair that this precedent should also be applied to the vacancy created by the retirement of Justice Anthony Kennedy only four months before the 2018 election.

**We should not vote on a new Supreme Court Justice before the American people vote in[November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e3454df/3586598820/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court") [Sign my petition if you agree: No Supreme Court vote until the American people vote.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e3454de/3586598820/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sign+my+petition+if+you+agree+No+Supreme&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")** | [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e34573c/3586598820/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")
---
We must let the American public speak in [November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e345733/3586598820/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+November&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court") about their desires for the direction of the Court and the country. We can _then_ contemplate filling the vacancy.

We are seeing every day that our young people are pushing back against the current direction of this country. These young people deserve a Supreme Court Justice who upholds the law. Who will defend a woman's right to choose, and marriage equality, and health care, and voting rights, and our workers' rights - and the many other issues they care deeply about.

This Justice will represent us _for decades._ In the face of that, I don't think four months is much to ask.

[Please add your name to join me if you agree that we must not vote to fill this seat until AFTER the midterm elections:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e345732/3586598820/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Please+add+your+name+to+join+me+if+you+a&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")
[**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e345731/3586598820/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")
---
The Constitution explicitly states that when considering Supreme Court nominations, the Senate shall give _advice and consent._

The Senate is an equal branch to the President in this matter. And what's more, the Republicans themselves set the precedent that American voters are as well.

[To me, it's clear: No Supreme Court vote until the American people vote. Click here to sign my petition and join me as we fight this every step of the way.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e345730/3586598820/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+To+me+itrsquos+clear+No+Supreme+Court+vo&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")

Thanks for standing with me,

_Tim_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ae/3e0906/6893100b/3e345737/3586598820/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNoSupremeCourtNomi&utm_campaign=20180628_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court")

clean_body: | | Derek - Yesterday, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement from the Supreme Court - and what happens next will affect each and every one of us. To me, it's clear. In 2016, the Republican Senate leadership established a precedent when it refused to take up the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Merrick Garland: Do not fill a Supreme Court vacancy in an election year. It is only fair that this precedent should also be applied to the vacancy created by the retirement of Justice Anthony Kennedy only four months before the 2018 election. We should not vote on a new Supreme Court Justice before the American people vote in "" "" | "" We must let the American public speak in "" about their desires for the direction of the Court and the country. We can then contemplate filling the vacancy. We are seeing every day that our young people are pushing back against the current direction of this country. These young people deserve a Supreme Court Justice who upholds the law. Who will defend a woman's right to choose, and marriage equality, and health care, and voting rights, and our workers' rights - and the many other issues they care deeply about. This Justice will represent us for decades. In the face of that, I don't think four months is much to ask. "" "" The Constitution explicitly states that when considering Supreme Court nominations, the Senate shall give advice and consent. The Senate is an equal branch to the President in this matter. And what's more, the Republicans themselves set the precedent that American voters are as well. "" Thanks for standing with me, Tim "" * | "" "" ""

| This Saturday at midnight will be a make-or-break moment: our most important quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the election year.

**The fundraising numbers that we report will set the tone for the rest of the election -- and here's why:** Florida Republicans, the media, and dark-money groups will scour our public FEC report and start making decisions on where they want to spend money attacking our Democratic champions.

[**That 's why I'm asking for your help today. Can you click here and donate $5 to help Florida Democrats win in just a few short months?**](http://act.floridadems. **We 've expanded our plans for this year to match the skyrocketing spending we're seeing from Republicans, but that means we need your help hitting our new fundraising goals before this FEC deadline: raising another $50,000 before midnight Saturday.**

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Ted Cruz is right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Following up, friends.
We wrote you yesterday about Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy's retirement. But since then, Ted Cruz has spoken out about the news. Here's what he said:
_"The Justice Kennedy vacancy is an opportunity to really have a profound impact on the court, an impact on the court that could last for decades."_
**He's right.** Confirming Donald Trump's nomination will not only roll back major victories we've made over the last decade, but it will change the course of our country for generations to come. That's why it's critical that we send Beto to the Senate. And we're only single digits away from making it happen!
**[Pitch in a donation of $3 today to help our grassroots, people-powered campaign be a check on Trump's Supreme Court pick.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98371/1645857671/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180628-EOQ5&amount=3")**
Landmark cases on marriage equality, healthcare, access to contraceptives were ALL decided by 5-4 rulings. _Citizens United_ , the Muslim ban, and voting rights too. There's too much on the line not to go all-in. We have to send a clear message that we will mobilize and fight for everything we believe in -- from equality and workers' rights to a woman's right to choose.
The choice is clear: we can either have Ted Cruz or Beto in the Senate voting on Supreme Court nominees. Someone who will vote for the agenda of special interests and corporations or someone who will vote for the people of Texas. We need to work every single day to cut Cruz's narrow lead and ensure it's Beto.
**[If you can, make an urgent donation of $3 today so we can meet our end-of-quarter goal, power this campaign forward, and send Beto to the Senate.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98371/1645857671/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180628-EOQ5&amount=3")**
Thanks for stepping up at a big moment,
Team Beto
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98371/1645857671/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180628-EOQ5&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98372/1645857671/VEsC/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98373/1645857671/VEsD/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921a0/3b1d797/799f6178/35a98374/1645857671/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: SherrodBrown.com
subject: Peter have you donated yet?

body:
|
---

| | Our first FEC quarter deadline of the General Election is in 48 hours, Peter. We couldn't help but notice that you haven't **donated to help us reach our $600,000 goal yet.** [**If you're ready now, just click this link. Even $5 or $10 will go a long way.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff971/4462dc26/57d02a03/2007a018/2877918308/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI4YW1uZCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180628amnd?refcode=sbe180628amnd_m_other&refcode2=3268183") If you need a little more reason to give, here's a few to get you started.
* **Sherrod's under attack.** President Trump and Vice President Pence have personally come to Ohio and attacked his record. Sherrod's multi-millionaire opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, is running attack ads.

* **He's under attack because Trump, Pence, and the special interests want him out of the Senate.** They'll spare no expense (literally) to see that happen.

* **Sherrod's fighting like hell for the families of Ohio.** From protecting access to affordable healthcare, to working for a livable minimum wage, to preserving Medicare and Social Security, Sherrod's on our side.

We did an okay job getting ourselves back on track to reach our FEC goal. But we still have a lot of ground to cover -- $38,000 in the next 48 hours. clean_body: | | | Our first FEC quarter deadline of the General Election is in 48 hours, Peter. We couldn't help but notice that you haven't donated to help us reach our $600,000 goal yet. "" If you need a little more reason to give, here's a few to get you started. Sherrod's under attack. President Trump and Vice President Pence have personally come to Ohio and attacked his record. Sherrod's multi-millionaire opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, is running attack ads. He's under attack because Trump, Pence, and the special interests want him out of the Senate. They'll spare no expense (literally) to see that happen. Sherrod's fighting like hell for the families of Ohio. From protecting access to affordable healthcare, to working for a livable minimum wage, to preserving Medicare and Social Security, Sherrod's on our side. We did an okay job getting ourselves back on track to reach our FEC goal. But we still have a lot of ground to cover -- $38,000 in the next 48 hours. "" "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" ""** Thanks! Team Sherrod | "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

body:

Friend --
**** We have less than 150 days until Election Day! The Westerman Campaign team has been traveling throughout the expansive 4th District, trying to reach voters from Magnolia to Mena, but we need your help! Team Westerman is looking for volunteers to continue the fight for **Less Hassle** and **More Freedom**! We need folks to help with signs, at festivals and parades, and with voter contact. name: Elise Convy
subject: four months left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

There are just over 18 weeks left until Election Day -- an election that will determine the direction of our country.

Will Social Security and Medicare be there when we retire -- or when our children retire? Will our families be able to afford life-saving medications? Will we take care of our environment? These are just some of the questions voters will be answering in November.

**Amy is working hard in the Senate to make sure the answer to all these questions is "Yes!" But she's facing re-election this year, and she can't do it without you.**
[**Will you donate before the end-of-quarter deadline?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1Ee%2BqkpKnIRerZt36Lp97NjGUDi%2BrG9U)

name: Team Heinrich
subject: The Koch brothers are coming after Martin because they're scared. Martin needs your help.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | When we heard the Koch brothers launched ads against Martin in New Mexico, we knew we had to start over from square one.

[](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2")
**We 've rewritten our entire budget to respond to these latest Koch ads, but now we have a $50,000 budget gap before our first FEC deadline since the news broke. We haven't seen your support yet this year, but this is the moment a contribution from you could make the biggest difference.**

**[Contribute now to help us close our budget gap before our Saturday deadline. We'll be publicly reporting our numbers after the Saturday deadline, and we can't miss the mark with the Koch brothers watching us now.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Contribute+now+to+help+us+close+our+budg&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DD_180628_1_2")**

This FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- Martin's opponents, the media, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether Martin has the strength to win his first reelection campaign in November.

With the Koch brothers running ads against Martin, we are rapidly expanding our organizing and advertising efforts so we can get the truth out about Martin's work. He's been a champion for New Mexicans in the Senate, and we can't risk him losing to one of his extreme right-wing opponents.

**If we file our strongest FEC report yet, we can combat these latest Koch ads and scare off future spending from dark-money groups. That 's why Saturday's FEC deadline is the most important day of this campaign to date.**

****_[If everyone receiving this email gave $10 now, we'd close our budget gap and be able to file our strongest FEC report yet on Saturday. Contribute now to help us close our budget gap.](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: S E N A T E
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c413b/24c69fd9/194eb9269/18839fa2/691948069/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER68N_digital_email_20180628_EOQFlipSenate_inact&source=WQEFER68N_digital_email_20180628_EOQFlipSenate_inact")
---

Peter,

Two. Seats.

That's how close we are to flipping the Senate: just two seats away.

We've already endorsed two phenomenal pro-choice Democratic women -- Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ) -- to replace two of the most vulnerable Senate Republicans.

But we also have to make sure we don't lose ground by re-electing all 10 of our EMILY's List women senators with seats up this year. It's our biggest group of re-elects to defend _ever_.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal and help elect and re-elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-June-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c413b/24c69fd9/194eb9269/18839fa3/691948069/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJuneGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFER68N_digital_email_20180628_EOQFlipSenate_inact&source=WQEFER68N_digital_email_20180628_EOQFlipSenate_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: We're falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | **[I'll be upfront -- this is a huge goal. We need $50,000 in the door before midnight on Saturday, and we're falling behind.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Irsquoll+be+upfront++this+is+a+huge+goal&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180628_1_5&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180628_1_5&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180628_1_5")**

Coming up short is not an option.

My opponents, special-interest groups, and GOP super PACs will be going over what we report on this FEC filing with a fine-tooth comb.

They'll use it to determine our strength and -- especially if we look vulnerable -- how much they want to spend against us between now and November.

**_[This is serious. We must report the strongest numbers possible to show this campaign shouldn't be messed with. That means bringing in $50,000 before midnight on June 30. Can I count you in?](http://act.kyrstensinema. Friends,

Going into the last weeks before the primary election, we're feeling pretty good here at Team Gillum. In the last month alone, Andrew led a rally against Donald Trump and the Republicans' decision to separate children from their parents, beat his opponents on the debate stage, and stood up for our progressive values.

Now, we're almost in the final 60 days, and we have a huge advantage in the field: **Polls show that Andrew can win.**

That's only going to happen with the support of people like you though. **[Can we count on you to chip in $5 before our end-of-quarter deadline this Saturday?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300f/9e00690/4694eedf/2402d1bf/3251677352/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1705&refcode=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++bef")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300f/9e00690/4694eedf/2402d1be/3251677352/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1705&refcode=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-+Express+Donate++ask+")

[Express Donate: $100](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300f/9e00690/4694eedf/2402d1b0/3251677352/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1705&refcode=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=5+-+Express+Donate++ask3+")
[Or donate another amount](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300f/9e00690/4694eedf/2402d1b3/3251677352/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1705&refcode=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount")
I want to make something very clear though: Andrew's the only Democrat running who isn't a millionaire or a billionaire, so he can't write us a six-figure check when funds get tight.

But we don't have to match their spending dollar-for-dollar if we raise enough to get our message out to our voters.

**[So please, chip in $5 before our end-of-quarter deadline to help us end this quarter stronger than ever.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300f/9e00690/4694eedf/2402d1b2/3251677352/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1705&refcode=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQ3_fnd_gq_act__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=7+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++before+our+endof")**

Brendan McPhillips

Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: the latest update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I have some good news and some bad:
After a poll came out showing us trailing GOP Sen. Dean Heller by one point here in Nevada, _POLITICO_ said, "Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller in the fall."
That's why this latest news from my team is so incredible: A generous group of donors has offered to match ****[every dollar donated before our critical $75,000 end-of-quarter FEC deadline](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d5/4fbb2af3/7e401efa/5e8bcef9/1535172111/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc0Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**** to help us close the gap and hit our match goal. ****[(Click here to push us over the top, help us win in NV to flip the Senate blue, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d5/4fbb2af3/7e401efa/5e8bcef9/1535172111/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc0Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

In a race this close, every gift could be the difference between winning or losing - between flipping the Senate blue or handing Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell another two years of GOP control and the power to decide the future of the Supreme Court. The GOP is going all in to win in Nevada and save its Senate majority, so we can't afford to lose momentum now. **A Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC is even spending $11.2 _million_ against us.**
**Please, I need every single grassroots supporter who cares about standing up to the GOP and taking back the Senate majority to step up _today_ , before it's too late. **[Please, give $5 and have every dollar DOUBLED to help us win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d5/4fbb2af3/7e401efa/5e8bcef9/1535172111/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc0Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk742-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

body:
Tina's counting on all of us to help her win this race. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bed1/c1f7015/6bf0ec41/1142e47b/65485029/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180628AM_em-B") Friends, This Saturday is the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign so far, and I'm reaching out because we've fallen behind and may not hit our grassroots goal. Here's why this goal is so important: Next week, we'll report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. Everyone will be watching to see if our team is strong enough to win in November. **If we put up low numbers, we 'll be forced to lower our budget, meaning we'll have to cut back on our voter outreach program and online and TV ads. **And even worse, our Republican opponent, backed by Donald Trump and special interest donors, will see she could have a path to victory -- and the GOP will pour dark money into this race to make sure they win. That's why we can't let up -- not even for a second. **[Contribute right now to send a message that Tina's grassroots support will propel her to victory in November! We need to raise $12,548 by Saturday night to meet our goal and stay on track.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bed1/c1f7015/6bf0ec41/1142e47b/65485029/VEsE/ name: ALERT [via Team Donnelly]
subject: time for real talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
They'll gut the ACA, pass more tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires, and slash Medicare and Social Security to pay for it. |
---

| | Real talk, Peter: our first public filing deadline of the general election is in two days, and we have to prove we can win this race by knocking our fundraising numbers out of the park -- otherwise, we risk losing out on the critical resources and support we need to beat the Republican money machine.

We're blown away by how many of you have stepped up so far. _Thank you._ **[But we're asking again because this is so important.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e03/7377f838/3cfa4cf9/51f9d042/1380463816/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-doublematch?refcode=20180628.1nd&amount=10")**

**Our opponent Republican Rep. Mike Braun is expected to raise a huge amount of money** from deep-pocketed GOP donors from across the country. Just last weekend, he was collecting checks at fundraisers in Beverly Hills and Washington, D.C. The GOP establishment is backing him because they know he'll be a reliable vote for Mitch McConnell's agenda in the Senate! **Imagine what Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Mitch McConnell could do with another Republican rubber stamp in the Senate, Peter!** They'll gut the ACA, pass more tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires, and slash Medicare and Social Security to pay for it. That's why we're asking you to help us out *before* our deadline at 11:59 PM on Saturday. Pundits will start making predictions about our chances of winning based on this finance report, so this is our most important fundraising deadline so far.

**This race could go either way. Don 't let it.** Help us protect Indiana's Democratic senator and **[STOP GOP EXTREMIST REP. BRAUN>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e03/7377f838/3cfa4cf9/51f9d042/1380463816/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-doublematch?refcode=20180628.1nd&amount=10")**

We have a double match in effect to make your donation go as far as possible before the 6/30 filing deadline. Are you with us, Peter? | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

They'll gut the ACA, pass more tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires, and slash Medicare and Social Security to pay for it. That's why we're asking you to help us out before our deadline at 11:59 PM on Saturday. Pundits will start making predictions about our chances of winning based on this finance report, so this is our most important fundraising deadline so far. This race could go either way. Don 't let it. Help us protect Indiana's Democratic senator and "" We have a double match in effect to make your donation go as far as possible before the 6/30 filing deadline. Are you with us, Peter? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks a million, Team Donnelly ******** ""******** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

name: Molly
subject: The stakes are higher than ever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
I need your help, friend.
Our first end-of-month deadline since I officially got on the ballot is right around the corner. **But time's running out to hit our critical $10,000 goal, and right now, we're falling way short.**
The stakes are higher than ever. There's no doubt that President Trump will use the newly vacant Supreme Court seat to attack women's rights and overturn Roe v. Wade - and we know we can't count on Governor Chris Sununu to stand up for New Hampshire women. That's why I'm running for governor to protect women's rights and access to reproductive health care.
**If we're going to ****defeat Chris Sununu and ****defend women in our state against Trump's anti-women agenda, I need grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can, right now:**
[**Please, friend****,**** will you give $5 or more - whatever you can spare before this must-hit deadline - to help me win in November so I can fight for women's rights as governor of New Hampshire?**](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc487f/d0ce7de/514ed142/9cd229a/3666835432/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk58-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
Peter, Dan is going all-in to
ensure that we stay on track to take back the House in November.
The attacks on our health care, our environment, and our core
values will never stop unless Congress actually does its job and
checks Trump.

We need your help to do our part to flip the House. The FEC
deadline is in just THREE DAYS. Contribute here to help us hit
our goal and post a winning report.

name: U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders
subject: Sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate that we should not vote on any potential Supreme Court justice until after the American people have had a chance to vote and a new Senate is sworn in next January.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Our job right now.
#

Friends -
The Supreme Court is the most important judicial body in the country. The decisions it reaches impact all Americans, even the ones that end up five votes to four.
Since the confirmation of Justice Neil Gorsuch, the court has taken a radical rightward turn. In the past 72 hours alone, it sided with big money interests against working people in an effort to destroy the union movement in this country. And it affirmed the president's Muslim ban and chose fear, racism and xenophobia over the American ideals of religious freedom and tolerance.
Those decisions, both 5-4 votes, were only possible because of the unprecedented actions of Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to deny President Obama's nominee a vote ahead of the 2016 elections. He did it because, in his own words, "The American people should have a voice in the selection of their next Supreme Court Justice."
**Now that Justice Kennedy will retire at the end of July, Mitch McConnell should remember those words. And our job right now is to make sure he does, and to make it clear the American people want a say in Justice Kennedy's replacement.**
**[Please sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate that there should not be a vote on any potential Supreme Court justice until after the American people have had a chance to vote in November and a new Senate is sworn in next January.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full")**
The truth is, the American people deserve a Supreme Court justice who respects the rights of workers instead of bowing down to big business. At a time of massive income and wealth inequality in this country, we need a court that will protect workers' rights and not just concern itself with corporate profits.
The American people deserve a Supreme Court that will move us back in the direction of one person, one vote and stop our slide into an oligarchy, in which the political life in this country is increasingly controlled by a handful of billionaire families. I fear that President Trump's next Supreme Court nominee would take the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision even further by supporting the elimination of all restrictions on campaign finance, effectively allowing billionaires to contribute unlimited sums to candidates.
We also cannot risk a Supreme Court that would put in jeopardy the privacy rights of all Americans and a woman's right to control her own body. Reproductive rights in this country are at risk. Despite overwhelming opposition from the American people I believe there is a very strong chance President Trump's next nominee would vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. We cannot allow that to happen.
The Supreme Court also recently sided with those who want to make it harder for people to vote. In the year 2018, it should not be too much to ask for people to be able to vote without harassment. Our job should be to make it easier for people to participate in the electoral process, not harder.
Now, the Koch brothers immediately pledged to spend more than seven figures pressuring Democrats into supporting President Trump's nominee.
**This time, we must be united from the start that there can be no vote on ANY nominee until the American people have had their chance to make their voices heard.**
**Add your name if you agree:**
**[Please sign my petition: Tell the U.S. Senate that we should not vote on any potential Supreme Court justice until after the American people have had a chance to vote in November and a new Senate is sworn in next January.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full")**
I believe most Americans want a Supreme Court that will stand up for civil liberties, constitutional rights, workers' rights, environmental rights and women's rights.
By now we know that is not what we will get from Donald Trump's nominee. And I believe the American people have a right to make their voices heard about that at the ballot box in November.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/scotus?source=em180628-t1-full")******
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
