name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: The Senate must not vote on any SCOTUS nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Mitch McConnell must follow his own rule.
#
Peter -
With Justice Kennedy's decision to retire at the end of July, the stakes of this year's election just got higher.
An already corporate Supreme Court would become much more dangerous with a new Trump appointee. A Justice picked by Trump and Republicans will take away more voting rights, give corporations more political power, and totally jeopardize women's rights to their own reproductive health decisions.
Here's the thing: We must insist that Mitch McConnell follow his own rule. In 2016, he said they could not vote on a justice because the American people needed a chance to weigh in first.
**[Sign my petition if you agree: Tell the Senate not to hold any vote on a new justice until the American people vote and a new Congress is sworn in next January.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e54/6e822e2f/1b1df2cf/417260a0/2407176650/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/scotus-vacancy?source=em180628-full")**
We must do everything we can to stop this nomination. It is not an exaggeration to say that our fundamental rights are on the line.
Near the top of that list: Roe v. Wade. Trump has a list of 25 judges that he is promising to appoint from. A requirement for being on that list is pledging to overturn Roe v. Wade.
In New York, Roe v. Wade is not codified, so if it is overturned, women in New York cannot rely on our own laws to protect our rights. I have been outspoken for years in calling on New York to codify Roe v. Wade: we cannot wait any longer.
This is an unprecedented moment in our history. A president whose corruption has created constitutional crisis after constitutional crisis has a chance to pack our country's highest court -- appointing people who will likely rule on cases against him and his businesses.
We must not let that happen, and the only way we can do that is by making our voice heard.
**[Sign my petition: Tell the Senate not to hold any vote on a new justice until the American people vote and a new Congress is sworn in next January.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e54/6e822e2f/1b1df2cf/417260a0/2407176650/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/scotus-vacancy?source=em180628-full")**
Democrats traditionally have been very bad at organizing and mobilizing around the courts as an issue. We cannot be complacent this time. This is a history-defining moment, and we have to do everything in our power to stop Trump and Mitch McConnell from appointing another right-wing radical.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e54/6e822e2f/1b1df2cf/417260a0/2407176650/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/scotus-vacancy?source=em180628-full")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I'll be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa95/34a064cc/8f2ba0f/70f7f43/2055995025/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE062818EOM1&source=IE062818EOM1")

| |
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Friend - In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. I'll be blunt: Saturday is our first public fundraising deadline of the general election. After this weekend, my team will report not only how much money we've raised, but also how many supporters like you have stepped up to power our effort. And what we need to do -- for the press, our opponents, and for anyone paying attention -- is send a message that our campaign, our diverse coalition, powered by people of all backgrounds and from all communities, has the strength to win in November. So here's why I ask: **[Can I count on you to make a $3 donation to our campaign before our critical fundraising deadline? Every donation matters. I would not ask if it were not important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa95/34a064cc/8f2ba0f/70f7f39/2055995025/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNjI4MThFT1EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-eoq?refcode=IE062818EOQ-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=IE062818EOQ-a&source=IE062818EOQ-a")** Friends, movements to create real, lasting progress are not built overnight, and I cannot do this alone. I am so proud of the movement we're building. Our campaign is for working people, powered by working people. I am with you, because I've been there. I'm still there. And if you stand with me in this fight, we will create a state where our dreams and aspirations become real and lasting legacies. With sincerest gratitude, Stacey Abrams
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: My meeting with President Trump
body:
Peter,
When I met with President Trump he expressed gratitude for all our prayers and the work we do to advance our shared cause.
I told him I wished he could meet with you, Peter, so that he could personally thank you.
He knows that Christian voters played a major role in the 2016 elections. So do the liberal media elites at The New York Time, Washington Post, CBS, ABC, NBC, and CNN.
That’s why they will say and do anything they can to confuse us and discourage our votes. I’m sure you’ve seen it almost daily in the media.
_Many call it “fake news.”_ They are being nice. I call it what they are: lies.
**We are at war with a counterfeit worldview. But we can bring it into the light when we take action (John 3:21). We must continue to call on our pastors and other church leaders to encourage Christians to gain awareness of the issues and understand the consequences of failure to act.**
A little over a year ago, President Trump honored one of his commitments to us by nominating Justice Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court.
And just yesterday Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy announced he is retiring at the end of July. This means President Trump will nominate a second Supreme Court Justice before the mid-term elections. This should remind us that elections are incredibly important.
These two Supreme Court appointments alone (Justice Gorsuch and President Trump’s next appointment) may be the difference between Christian freedom and a secularist, anti-Christian future for our children and grandchildren.
While these victories are a great result of Christians’ votes in 2016, it’s just the beginning; this is not the finish line. We must not lose sight of all that is at stake this year. There is still so much more to do to overturn the liberal policies of the past.
In just a few months voters all across the nation will go to the polls. The radical Left has been very busy. They are set on winning back the Senate for their radical agenda. And in several special Congressional elections, they have dumped hundreds of millions of dollars and bussed in activists to stir up what they are calling “resistance” for their counterfeit worldview.
They have dangerous momentum on their side. When they see what our 2016 votes are still accomplishing in vital decisions such as Supreme Court nominations and rulings, it only motivates the secular left to mobilize to the polls this November.
I’m afraid we can’t wait another week before we launch our plans for 2018.
**Once again in 2018, My Faith Votes will lead a national effort to empower Christian voters with the truth and the resources to share with others the importance of involvement in the election process.**
We will roll-out successful strategies employed in 2016 and refine new ones to combat progressive liberal policies and expose liberal candidates who do not support truth or a biblical worldview.
We know it works. Eighty-five percent of people reached by My Faith Votes in 2016 voted!
But to be successful in 2018, it is critical for us to once again have your financial support. You have been so generous in the past, I know I can count on you again.
[Peter, your investment of $25, $35 or more TODAY will equip us with the resources needed for success. Elections are already underway](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180628apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180628apl01nd&n=1).
We must act quickly. I realize that what I’m asking is a sacrifice, but if we don’t immediately counter the efforts of those with radical and false beliefs, it may be too late.
I can see a dark future for our nation – one where Christian values are shoved aside, the abortion industry advanced and religious liberty silenced in the public square – if we don’t take a stand NOW.
[Your tax-deductible donation today, in any amount, will make a difference](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180628apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180628apl01nd&n=2).
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180628apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180628apl01nd&n=3)
I thank you for your prayerful consideration of this appeal. May God bless you!
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180628apl01nd&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180628apl01nd&n=5).

There is still so much more to do to overturn the liberal policies of the past. In just a few months voters all across the nation will go to the polls. The radical Left has been very busy. They are set on winning back the Senate for their radical agenda. And in several special Congressional elections, they have dumped hundreds of millions of dollars and bussed in activists to stir up what they are calling “resistance” for their counterfeit worldview. They have dangerous momentum on their side. When they see what our 2016 votes are still accomplishing in vital decisions such as Supreme Court nominations and rulings, it only motivates the secular left to mobilize to the polls this November. I’m afraid we can’t wait another week before we launch our plans for 2018. Once again in 2018, My Faith Votes will lead a national effort to empower Christian voters with the truth and the resources to share with others the importance of involvement in the election process. We will roll-out successful strategies employed in 2016 and refine new ones to combat progressive liberal policies and expose liberal candidates who do not support truth or a biblical worldview. We know it works. Eighty-five percent of people reached by My Faith Votes in 2016 voted! But to be successful in 2018, it is critical for us to once again have your financial support. You have been so generous in the past, I know I can count on you again. . We must act quickly. I realize that what I’m asking is a sacrifice, but if we don’t immediately counter the efforts of those with radical and false beliefs, it may be too late. I can see a dark future for our nation – one where Christian values are shoved aside, the abortion industry advanced and religious liberty silenced in the public square – if we don’t take a stand NOW. . I thank you for your prayerful consideration of this appeal. May God bless you! United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Steve Smith
subject: Big new endorsement
body:
|
---
Friend, I’ve got a big announcement for the campaign. Please make sure you read this email to the very end. It may be one of the most important emails I have sent in the campaign to date... June 30th is a big day. Not only is it the last day of the month but it is the end of the quarter, which means that I must submit a campaign finance report to the FEC. This is the last report I will submit to the FEC before the August primary. My opponents, the media, the establishment, and political class are watching to see how much I raise. The stakes are high. If I do not report robust fundraising numbers, it would change the circumstances of the race. Friend, let me be honest with you. I need your help. This campaign is achieving great momentum. I’m proud to announce to you that Jeff DeWit, the COO of the Trump campaign and former Arizona Treasurer, has endorsed our campaign. The National Border Patrol Council has endorsed our campaign, which marks the **first time ever** that the group representing the 18,000+ border patrol officers, has endorsed a US House candidate in a primary. And, Senator Ted Cruz endorsed our campaign! [**I know that we can win this race; however, I need your help. Friend, will you step up today and make an online donation to the campaign? Please click here to donate anything you can afford >>>**](https://stevesmith4congress.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fsmith-congress%2Fonline1&e=1ef714a981fccbc77f128da79d76de41&utm_source=stevesmith4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_announcement&n=1) My goal is to raise another $5,000 from online donors by the 30th. I am counting on your help. [**Please make a generous donation before you do anything else today.**](https://stevesmith4congress.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fsmith-congress%2Fonline1&e=1ef714a981fccbc77f128da79d76de41&utm_source=stevesmith4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_announcement&n=2) Thank you, and God Bless. Steve
Steve Smith for Congress · United States

name: Kerry Gooch
subject: MEMO: New polling data in KS-02
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
TO: Peter
FROM: Kerry Gooch, Campaign Manager, Paul Davis for Kansas
RE: New polling data in KS-02

New polling data, conducted by The Mellman Group, was just released. The bottom line is this:

**Despite the Republican lean of Kansas ' 2nd District, Paul leads the pack! **
* **Paul leads by 5 points, 39%-34%, against Republicans ' leading challenger**
* **Paul 's lead grows to 9 points the more voters know about him**
* **Paul is both the best known and most liked candidate**

**Our campaign is very encouraged by these numbers, but we take nothing for granted.**

Outside super PACs have already pledged to spend $1.25 million in misleading attack ads against Paul, and we know that is only the beginning. If these attacks take hold, our lead could evaporate by the fall.

Our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is Saturday and we're still coming up a little short on our ambitious goal. **If you can help with a contribution of $3 or more right now, here 's the best link: [pauldavis.com/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/DrCmSK4t4BobXBwyMU6Eh7vzsUPadObojP60Q7k3ZBY=/XLWzL3DnxRPRCc3dXlou2xQNwtYqLmnbB5QqARGGF6o=?gpsid=13_36_1737&refcode=em18_180628_EOQmem_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180628_EOQmem_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Justice Kennedy just announced his plan to retire from the Supreme Court, giving Donald Trump an opportunity to nominate a right-wing justice who will permanently alter the court for _decades_ to come.
**Everything from women 's health to voting rights and the future of health care is on the line right now,** so Democrats need to do everything we can to take back the Senate - but right now that's in jeopardy.
**POLITICO just reported, "Democrats have almost _no shot_ at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller in the fall,"** and a recent poll shows Jacky neck and neck with her GOP opponent.

_Begin original message from Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo:_

This Saturday at midnight will be a make-or-break moment: our most important quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the election year.

**The fundraising numbers that we report will set the tone for the rest of the election -- and here's why:** Florida Republicans, the media, and dark-money groups will scour our public FEC report and start making decisions on where they want to spend money attacking our Democratic champions.

[**That 's why I'm asking for your help today. Can you click here and donate $5 to help Florida Democrats win in just a few short months?**](http://act.floridadems. **We 've expanded our plans for this year to match the skyrocketing spending we're seeing from Republicans, but that means we need your help hitting our new fundraising goals before this FEC deadline: raising another $50,000 before midnight Saturday.**

clean_body: | | Don't miss Terrie's note, see below! We noticed you haven't contributed yet this year, but if everyone donated $5 today we'd hit our goal well before our FEC deadline... Begin original message from Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo: This Saturday at midnight will be a make-or-break moment: our most important quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the election year. The fundraising numbers that we report will set the tone for the rest of the election -- and here's why: Florida Republicans, the media, and dark-money groups will scour our public FEC report and start making decisions on where they want to spend money attacking our Democratic champions. "" Tens of millions of dollars are pouring into Florida in races up and down the ballot. Already, Rick Scott has spent $17 million on ads. On top of that, the Tampa Bay Times is reporting gubernatorial races are likely to break the record for the most cash ever raised (currently $150 million). We 've expanded our plans for this year to match the skyrocketing spending we're seeing from Republicans, but that means we need your help hitting our new fundraising goals before this FEC deadline: raising another $50,000 before midnight Saturday. "" Democrats are depending on you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a link below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page. "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for your support. name: Sean Duffy
subject: I’m with Leah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate **
body:
I’m sick and tired of seeing reforms that can really help American families die in the U.S. Senate. The Senate Democrats will do everything they.....

Friend -

I’m sick and tired of seeing reforms that can really help American families die in the U.S. Senate. The Senate Democrats will do everything they can to stop us from passing President Trump’s agenda.

What’s really embarrassing is that one of the chief obstructionists is our own senator, Tammy Baldwin. And, friend, I think it’s time we told her enough is enough.

Wisconsinites need strong leaders to represent our values in Washington. We need another senator who will fight for lower taxes, secure borders, and our Constitution.**[I am convinced that Leah Vukmir is the fighter we need, and I am proud to endorse her.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVh5f1gngwkMkGX0SvvZdcX6SefpgdDPz7i-am9dG0gZ9ix6-1VVNw211hpdJAK2eDXRf7sINWvoRvph4rDka2ywwp-2CbKtk6sW_qZ-DQ-ZnYvT-kQpFG-fgEueJCqIGc3hCGHWCuDsXaU1AqtLI6bh2ZHgRE0xab2lMnFQtJvY9_hZHsI_Cr8NDUOSbNUSKib5DS5Pv2w8GJnAeRhCS_mx-W8hn3bBLY34ey5K6M4GtFDIjWuDxWs2RuxFeBwgRUYuyscG7jWIAaNeQJPWmlU5RfIXyTocpa_hoURrPMYR0PcDXfxtR5Iv2Ilepe8gVy1imigV28ME8SWZd8BP3H5Kx7A-ENPFFE53wN5-cEk6MGxKUCpy6LAH_2hTZ8ZY2Ow2x6ht4UC-2oqE1mowJY_U%3D)**

****[JOIN ME, ENDORSE LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVh5f1gngwkMkGX0SvvZdcX6SefpgdDPz7i-am9dG0gZ9ix6-1VVNw211hpdJAK2eDXRf7sINWvoRvph4rDka2ywwp-2CbKtk6sW_qZ-DQ-ZnYvT-kQpFG-fgEueJCqIGc3hCGHWCuDsXaU1AqtLI6bh2ZHgRE0xab2lMnFQtJvY9RYEAdS0p_hS6PE-zj764uatz1G2CW0-D7tAvh1fkGQmIMkwuMzF8GCnq6vl1hZp4AbjAR8IjrSDot25OQfyn430GTOzQGu1dX2H1GXfbtVp36jy5XJWg8rkT8oeOlEZFw7TmF0PkTzZLKGj6B7oMTZ7OUydLCJy_wBHr82xLz7JslfvTebeR4sOajmCluMWtZrLtwbgpZrpmZyVIpsxavn3iklq-NVEWK3IDs_xtt4o%3D)****
---
**** ** **

What conservative reform in Wisconsin has Leah not been at the center of? She stood with Governor Walker to pass Act 10, balanced our budget and helped us reach record-low unemployment.

We don’t have to question whether Leah will fight with President Trump for Wisconsin. She has already proven that in the face of unprecedented intimidation tactics she will stand up to the angry, unhinged left.

**Leah Vukmir is the champion Wisconsinites can count on to be a voice for us in Washington, unafraid to speak her mind and do what she knows to be right.** I am confident that Leah will keep up the fight and accept nothing but the best for all of us.

Friend, I hope you will take a moment to join me in **[showing your support for Leah Vukmir](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVh5f1gngwkMkGX0SvvZdcX6SefpgdDPz7i-am9dG0gZ9ix6-1VVNw211hpdJAK2eDXRf7sINWvoRvph4rDka2ywwp-2CbKtk6sW_qZ-DQ-ZnYvT-kQpFG-fgEueJCqIGc3hCGHWCuDsXaU1AqtLI6bh2ZHgRE0xab2lMnFQtJvY91Qt8iIwu316wvuVVOgyQ8q4hXTTvsbNTB8cz50a9O17C7yOwISjhqKYr7PltFrWj-LVNifdkd2rp29V-_BClVZ7Mr0sIRXJwI1NM-fUKCZd5Nv4FnMLVloWcSr1r3LvZLU-xP452LQw0RypODLa4zKHlysxRtMzvf68ngMOEp8Mf-lgHQv0_AGAFPlZhouXsyV_vEP6USMZ68GBL8GpRTDQriqUJ4OEfyT00BbBC4fU%3D) **– the fighter Wisconsin needs.

Make sure you do it soon – we want to make sure this wave of support is strong, and send a message to Senator Baldwin: Watch out for Leah.

****[STAND WITH LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVh5f1gngwkMkGX0SvvZdcX6SefpgdDPz7i-am9dG0gZ9ix6-1VVNw211hpdJAK2eDXRf7sINWvoRvph4rDka2ywwp-2CbKtk6sW_qZ-DQ-ZnYvT-kQpFG-fgEueJCqIGc3hCGHWCuDsXaU1AqtLI6bh2ZHgRE0xab2lMnFQtJvY9PuDSTUw6wQbrKyK-VKAEhLz4izxYIgKoyWi962u59rjEnwRjBAvNnjIqnmN67ZWiXjgSe1WoIn4-ywiylC0wGtdZQjimRsfYPkSGbj-wynMYjvgchSc754YlJMUIYwMJp7A_jZF-4PLmV7tKLKC9NUyw4vYIU22ioK6_Ssa9mSF4Zjjesj8a7DB6wKTOxa_GBwMZi3-63s664ddhNhTWqTK683PCI1DHD4EMXfC3NRA%3D) ** **
---
**** ** **
Sean Duffy

**** ** **
****[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVltBjRn6z2M7vSCoy6IwJelp0pP9apFh5bd9t-3EEFffonU_8DBwUL_h6DvXROfJna0isdO7soMG-p2qvjuNbnWsJbxvHxH7EpVJ1sdLlsIv0_mQF0dKcmor9d41_U3lECXFOwAHgnDKh1pRG_UmOmkF49fiAPtxZx2_CiVFBBZNOI86xulfrkC07mMQvsr-VpnvisfdKA2HNI668nR7XAC4_fuGIOFO_OjjaLf22uk2HFvkxbJz-AqwV89m6aBJhg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVultMT2JMB9FV2f6zqH_-fZMQzEW63BzWQIQvmx4cSA2PyqNB_VpYqT5BeE0b8o8MGiksVrQhvZxSER_eW9qCcI4x5vH9w6cbkuor2W-Sgm1aZ39KP-eQDo7KLc4DHBQhOChY38h-XIrOniMWpG2IFmaImyC3Z-_0Ouz3L9tMyBwRgPdAHILqV8kNfTWrb6khvhnbcRHAcZ4GB9t9T7Z_AtSy01IoU6VU6rhXOeZ0H2pVj_cAxjRT2U0FcmDllZ4kQ%3D%3D) ** **
** ** **Paid for by Leah for Senate **
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=eELgdwr8LbDBaxXXWSWJLJtSpeTvy_qm0TJYR7iAVCikd4OiUvll46DdCwY1CFy1fRFFJofHyaGKAVmJS6sh4c-GMR9N1Ju27aWte7puuAjhoFphki63QCW9Z6BLYjAtAFELH44ZUS5ckoqOKyIF9O4SDjug8AD-X7w57PSINqSW7a8B60WWtrLsNsXnNGXdwXX3UmGY8yx3uAk8ve-XwqkgHZvmZ4824aVXm4gJw0z365Gv8ZPnVxAFTV9FTHlD). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVgX5v9ppmd17osDllA-Df-u0ntbK72vd6cdEs1l2fgzp1icOzYobcRGRU6HOcNaYulnqHqBysyixD4PItVI29njDPAw4pwuWSuGRUT7kJeOgT4E8UiVBTmNPp_AVLamNtydu7E6nPQ-JJCaE3R8WBG3iLXWu8hATrJA2emEHvRWK265qc7ws1WqtjZ13sGafjbdBSOxitCssacr64ox5FwajvTN0RWd7vb-I7-X9-aMLfgDKFq_LOgOw70cVzWXgZ0PRaSQgIbMmUNf6m2axU7zZubx5mDWtVp6s_KyOb3b1hXFSAg7iRz1XdnUSyK-fyY1cTzFRn6Tr8qEYEwAvmTgbUL5QT7qzuoWu-WPvUmyj) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVgX5v9ppmd17osDllA-Df-tl1lCiGffcYJIJdTvYAHy3z25x3BEHiRHRAUralzP81YTXuLghPkT4Tv5ETWnRhvR9oFq5HUmdmbQFUIPw-xG7KoxLF_iWwlHCFMrJ1avKGXfG3Tg06bVloxfBH0nKrht8XLV4bsC9p8tP_Mnhr9hRtcAeKWcaXZ2zIAe7yrK7dUBHTDDVAHhFdCawYqFtaT_1x6jBu4hzqR357ISaeh_4AFvgwvtrsHVkSkYsWorUpDQl7UHR1CKSLbunKFbeFIAVxnm5wSqSJTzdxD9ARIU-QJqL7Vn0tfhhNTMUjitIN4tWT5MCZKeUqzO74GTnFPE7qFiADBV6vg-TGBo8YB01) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVltBjRn6z2M7vSCoy6IwJelp0pP9apFh5bd9t-3EEFffo1QPpSCOFgCzDD2U_nDCvTjj2C8DuzEVoMlBF87WNpI8OHLh6mvH-Go8ohE-KonjOhnMQNr5ZUMTq_nt8n_DkjnjsZ5l_t-zcYKDBXxEZ8xDErwv15fh35sgSfvtHGxpWI9AX3bk4K4N5eFgafjmZ3gJ3u0aU2HFkyDDpTxyhoRUTsC6g_jHefXlYe0i_mw0Eb3h-oSnGnEAQogTn2sbAw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVultMT2JMB9FV2f6zqH_-fZMQzEW63BzWQIQvmx4cSA2nEecNSm-FqpIrQImaIoCtQk0qSojhgKY6-Gmr-QA95Wl_pMlr0-9YaZhdy_xsblsvFT2mBF0hXda0R4OEAoF7i_wLR9toa1W8vW4lwPMu3o8i-JzFtsSNIlIi72kDln4lz7dvBkcfL_ARsrPzG-uHhkRlYOGba95zNA8GqdiKo11UjxpHYyVV_2MgtguOaXJhhWvyIUGDZWlYkt7OHDtdg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVk6ypze_WkSop_2dLrl7eU_80bIAFnt0a5Gq3M2EdOVPSsNokD3VbaJzDwuZ56eaSiXRbQx-j0TRo7QmRZ_hW-RNbAv7BfKx5dMAetiWuzFsJEouwSxHdcQdRkwGS9z0TdBaN42-IAVjgbjzc44AtCSuea35cmHe63K9StkKgaOXlC_pZmOAIfaId0NhwM8714Wb7YlpDFHnetryd9snn9NWNt3R30qK4GWxPBV4PybBdFyNjLcmq3LckSut43xyUA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0edaaeb97ce44e8ca9c34d91c4fe6442&_e=5enQqJzYSLSkq1Tp9s2zVgX5v9ppmd17osDllA-Df-su_2kt1X4v-8-WI__Bkbrb-ujDf61E8cAxfvWsamA0QWfbyMIOdAdDvJSkHgTkIdDNoZEB1c-0lCHmpt27vmrS7XhdwqV0ixcsR6aXA3h8_IWSkNr40oUYb_3POkyGge6WaI308fRnJgLx_WL9crelQiruicUkLaLkYY9iM-luENmHAU_p3D_u3SLwfOcGmABWX0p3zsAgmsYLZQIAWxL6o6w_uKpmnh_a5KkwPRygkbK-H_7bsPYrBt3TxBwcmSMe5TMT-dt8L7ybDSZOPUTc1Z984PindNDrd3-WRiCF0KN-lTy2k2fHUnBzYF-7lSdl_TGwzrct_es_5C3vsvoNQ0FiKhg2R0pEVrHuAXxApg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. clean_body: I’m sick and tired of seeing reforms that can really help American families die in the U.S. Senate. The Senate Democrats will do everything they..... Friend - I’m sick and tired of seeing reforms that can really help American families die in the U.S. Senate. The Senate Democrats will do everything they can to stop us from passing President Trump’s agenda. What’s really embarrassing is that one of the chief obstructionists is our own senator, Tammy Baldwin. And, friend, I think it’s time we told her enough is enough. Wisconsinites need strong leaders to represent our values in Washington. We need another senator who will fight for lower taxes, secure borders, and our Constitution. ** What conservative reform in Wisconsin has Leah not been at the center of? She stood with Governor Walker to pass Act 10, balanced our budget and helped us reach record-low unemployment. We don’t have to question whether Leah will fight with President Trump for Wisconsin. She has already proven that in the face of unprecedented intimidation tactics she will stand up to the angry, unhinged left. Leah Vukmir is the champion Wisconsinites can count on to be a voice for us in Washington, unafraid to speak her mind and do what she knows to be right. I am confident that Leah will keep up the fight and accept nothing but the best for all of us. Friend, I hope you will take a moment to join me in – the fighter Wisconsin needs. Make sure you do it soon – we want to make sure this wave of support is strong, and send a message to Senator Baldwin: Watch out for Leah. Sean Duffy Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: U.S. Senator Tim Kaine
subject: I am asking you directly, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
We're smack in the middle of a critical election year, so if you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time. Chip in before Saturday's deadline.
---
This November we have a chance to start fixing this mess and send a clear message to President Trump and Republicans in Congress that the majority of the American people do not support division, corruption, or immoral policies.

But we can only do it if millions of us come together to reclaim our democracy and get our country back on track. We're smack in the middle of a critical election year, so if you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time.

**It has never been more critical to stand with Democrats, Derek. Can I count on you to step up and make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before Saturday's deadline?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea96a/1621756127/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea96b/1621756127/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea968/1621756127/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea969/1621756127/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea976/1621756127/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea977/1621756127/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")
** You and I both know the best way to defend our values and protect our democracy for future generations is by building a strong Democratic Party capable of winning everywhere in 2018, 2019, and beyond.

As a former DNC chair, I can tell you exactly what that means: Putting more organizers on the ground, equipping a diverse field of candidates with all of the tools they need to take their message to voters, and building up our state parties -- in every state, not just battlegrounds.

If we can do that, we will win in November. But it will require us all working together to rebuild and strengthen the Democratic Party right now -- not in September or October.

**[I am asking you directly, Derek: Before Saturday's deadline, can you make a $3 contribution? Your contribution will make a huge difference.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea974/1621756127/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+%0AI+am+asking+you+directlyCUSTOMDATASETsl&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")**

Thank you,

Tim Kaine
U.S. Senator, Virginia

P.S. I'll always have a special place in my heart for the DNC and people like you who support it. **[Before Saturday's deadline, can you make a $3 contribution to build our party?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea975/1621756127/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Before+Saturdays+deadline+can+you+make+a&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea972/1621756127/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea973/1621756127/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea970/1621756127/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea971/1621756127/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405212c0/4067b0a/6659748a2/7fbea97e/1621756127/VEsHBg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180628_tk_nd&source=em_20180628_tk_nd&refcode=em_20180628_tk_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Bredesen for Senate
subject: Bumping this → Fwd: What happens next for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
**Hey Peter, did you see Governor Bredesen’s email from earlier?**
[**Hundreds of grassroots supporters (like you) are pitching in $5 or whatever they can ahead of our End-Of-Quarter deadline to help get our message of common sense in front of voters. Can you help too?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520692/8195073/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520693/8195074/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)**
**If you haven’t already, please take a moment and read Governor Bredesen’s important message below about what’s next for our campaign.**

* * *

Peter --
My campaign has a big fundraising deadline coming up at the end of this week — our end of quarter deadline. It’s important because, after Saturday, we’ll be reporting how much support we’re getting in this campaign.
For most campaigns, they’ll do whatever it takes to raise as much money as they can ahead of these deadlines. Sometimes that means scary subject lines and all-caps text.
But we’re not like most campaigns. Before asking for your support, [**I always take a moment to explain why your donations of $5 or more really are so important for these deadlines.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520694/8195075/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)
Washington is broken — I know that’s not news to you. But right now, across our state, Tennesseans of every background are coming together in the hopes of fixing it.
While Washington politicians keep trying to make this race about their partisan games, the Tennesseans I’ve been talking to on the campaign trail are making it clear that what they want in their next U.S. Senator is someone who can bring people together to get things done.
But this race is going to be tough in this era of “us” vs. “them” politics. We need help from grassroots supporters like you to get our message out and keep this race focused on the issues that affect our communities every day. **That’s why I’m asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us reach our end of quarter fundraising goal? Your support is going to be what makes the difference in this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520695/8195076/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520696/8195077/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)**
We need something better than the hyper-partisan bickering we’re getting from Washington. And we need solutions to the very real problems facing communities across our state.
That’s why I’m applying for the job.
—Phil
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520697/8195078/-213601972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0NjFhMi0yZDdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eed0_8YOkG7uI2R9Braxoir1-CUAaLYsVgfTrYqDYDU=&refcode=em180628-eoq1-lift-full&recurring=true)**

**We 've rewritten our entire budget to respond to these latest Koch ads, but now we have a $50,000 budget gap before our first FEC deadline since the news broke. We haven't seen your support yet this year, but this is the moment a contribution from you could make the biggest difference.**

**[Contribute now to help us close our budget gap before our Saturday deadline. We'll be publicly reporting our numbers after the Saturday deadline, and we can't miss the mark with the Koch brothers watching us now.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Contribute+now+to+help+us+close+our+budg&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180628_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180628_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180628_2_3")**

With the Koch brothers running ads against Martin, we are rapidly expanding our organizing and advertising efforts so we can get the truth out about Martin's work. He's been a champion for New Mexicans in the Senate, and we can't risk him losing to one of his extreme right-wing opponents.

**If we file our strongest FEC report yet, we can combat these latest Koch ads and scare off future spending from dark-money groups. That 's why Saturday's FEC deadline is the most important day of this campaign to date.**

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8ba0cd624ca4dedaeb4fb68d854b081&_e=BOSncYRRBTq81Nx7_pJwm1w2XkgYMlWyCKg18ejbDs20hv3SZcWqD8bICY2qUWv35mLq30FkzyYsg-U96UxozdK_KEjBN75OHy04-SBWHu7X_FESmot5dxeB4sYwxJQTEtmVuOzAWMtWCB8L3Ga0A5CnPIsXUUXstZQaXQwT34lPWHzagKdts-IhrtEKoB58-OhNtiqZIAMnjGRdKzHOFfBfStV12WZ0z-IaxMUOg_dsuL3_XSzAHCQO0iFa3P8IwctQEgx-yc0sliCWGJ7adR62XouWr01kGbgcW81Gj8ezsXDc9JPIdSN7QMxMef8ab7JYH2dmix1b1lXtG3fM_uDFDAbkrLJol8E11_lXydWEJOyWhh4ZYYnDFUoQI9Og) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8ba0cd624ca4dedaeb4fb68d854b081&_e=BOSncYRRBTq81Nx7_pJwm1w2XkgYMlWyCKg18ejbDs0QRtn3UxtE1UkmRKdjZbErWSKAuXFhzGIjG0jtg1UY6tvk8VKgM2IGagNlYNZXM0mm0wEIBpEgyWqs34qRHQYjHjrLwnZy6VtQNlPmtya1VOhMq1iX-Zzy_i0NWUtCNqoneZibyRTjQfNN3UIJD36pueF6SLbOzzxJXRr8dUqK8NWt9d1c1-qMS6ncCNFit8j3jvdQ0abYVA1iLk8V0FFhZHcnDZ8bgZCf8SF_cgN-g083h0Zocc15HqKdbmp2ZHZXHV3Z03oiEDKVhsqndhCjYbo4ux5zgmghsX-a-tre6f864GDx7mAHY2cX0Meb7wWanNsfkArfWbADjE3xNbcm) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8ba0cd624ca4dedaeb4fb68d854b081&_e=BOSncYRRBTq81Nx7_pJwm24HNWrfaf3erPaRvPii6_e2jkR0FB1M9AvVFfZbw7FGWFxHukN_pH-xuewEAEft1XphBaDfTfZ67-S_2ZWmPJLP9BZcZtQFPsh81tcccDlKThPXETA5ZcIsGj5w_88wMInVg0ADE0HBsgSYP8TJ0aKEvGouGC4Oel4Mdoid9I4OXrvH5wlmGd8OR9j4WYb3-WDaRdhfZpduibKSb-w1m4fLfLXTasP6psvcK6sB5dLQywfWgGkTnk5jLI3UYUJEuw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8ba0cd624ca4dedaeb4fb68d854b081&_e=BOSncYRRBTq81Nx7_pJwm-8B91uVxeWNfBaMdCem7hhiWGiGXA8AlD8AAv1vXrjFi67wGnpqV_p_JrxSfsL3nSWf5_Cf6gSTFij_FFeLknpSrQkSrGPxU_AiWEuLbgZ3QioOTxrxcLbSB_ddGW-rOS8oAJOTjarm3Kn_kBM8-ckWXgmuEdz0NrGSHIIOyr5FLdH69rI2g6CoFJtoAW2qz_ixuxWBulU3EZBHVyT5iNgIhVMeYE4cbU0qHX6zUH22j2A0iUCPBnTnoNWE8--77w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c8ba0cd624ca4dedaeb4fb68d854b081&_e=BOSncYRRBTq81Nx7_pJwm4AM1d5mTwI4jYcQHDDuBYfjTYVlcAKk0whnyxTS5QU4__oFnxe_7XWm1tbdw7Jv7KgCstXBcraGrGCG7sAJcc0TsvB5dZUqWVJYN1ZmyKkBkBdtAe8PkZ-mxfWIp4qi0FiqSPNw5AzEAi6zcg2vO3iipiVaLKHTGqOMC2q9GfTMDGCYCpCWfc3S7N4BsXt-GN-jUk79S1cfxRnfTVIjUngi8sW-chB07Ln-5FOjNFwlEBxp0E8eDEdhgFNn6E5hxQ%3D%3D) feed. clean_body: It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of... Friend, we’re just 2 days away from one of the biggest tests our campaign has faced. It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline since we won the Republican Party of Wisconsin endorsement at last month’s convention, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goal. We have $12,509 left to go. ** I'm just going to be honest with you. Democrats are outraising AND outspending us! According to recent reports in Politico, Democrats have spent over $7 million to re-elect Senator Baldwin and make Wisconsin a blue state again. They are spending money to buy this election and silence YOUR opinion! We HAVE to fight back! Please, friend, let’s show them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation and close out this quarter with a huge bang. If you can chip in today, even just $25, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington: Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Does he still think Gorsuch was an "excellent choice?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Elections matter - and the proof has never been more stark.

In the last couple days, ultra-conservatives on the Supreme Court have attacked women, immigrants and now turned their attention to public employees. These unbelievable decisions prove that re-electing Bob Menendez has never mattered more.

Bob Hugin worked hard and gave big bucks to elect Donald Trump, allowing Trump to put Neil Gorsuch, a far-right ideologue on the court. And now, Gorsuch was the deciding vote in one case which upheld Trump's travel ban that discriminates against Muslims, another case that rolls back women's rights and access to reproductive care and in a case that guts labor unions and blatantly attacks public employees.

So while Bob Menendez was fighting to stop Donald Trump, protect women's rights, fight for the working-class, and stand against bigotry, xenophobia, and fear-mongering, Bob Hugin did the opposite.

And if Hugin gets elected to the U.S. Senate, you can be darn sure that he'll be a rubber stamp for Trump and more far-right justices just like Gorsuch. In fact, Hugin's called Gorsuch an "excellent choice."

[**We can't let that happen. Chip in $3 or more to help re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez and show Donald Trump and his allies you won't let these Supreme Court decisions stand.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c84/3af3c5d/3b4e6901/4ec3bf8f/2957858764/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1719&refcode=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_campaign=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+cant+let+that+happen+Chip+in+3+or+mor")

One only has to look out from Liberty State Park to Ellis Island to be reminded how millions of immigrants, many of whom were fleeing war, famine, or persecution, first set foot in New Jersey and New York. Trump's Muslim ban not only goes against what it means to be an American, but it also makes us less safe, as it harms our relationship with allies in the Middle East.

It is wrong.

And with leading women's rights organizations saying the Supreme Court's narrow 5-4 decision is "one step closer to the end of Roe" now is not the time to send a strong supporter of Donald Trump who thinks Neil Gorsuch is an "excellent choice" to the U.S. Senate.

Now yesterday's decision will crush labor unions by forcing them to work with fewer resources, making it harder to protect our working families. Bob Menendez was endorsed by the New Jersey AFL-CIO because unlike Hugin, he'll stand up for organized labor.

[**It's time to re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez. It's never mattered more. Chip in $3 or more right now if you're ready to get to work and fight for our shared values.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c84/3af3c5d/3b4e6901/4ec3bf8e/2957858764/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1719&refcode=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_campaign=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Its+time+to+reelect+Democratic+Senator+B")

Thank you,

Frank

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Bob Menendez for Senate

**[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c84/3af3c5d/3b4e6901/4ec3bf81/2957858764/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_scotus?gpsid=5_73_1719&refcode=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_campaign=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")**

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c84/3af3c5d/3b4e6901/4ec3bf86/2957858764/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=10+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS&source=em18_180628_W-SCOT_fnd_gq_cust__FS") from Menendez for Senate emails.

name: URGENT@bobcasey.com
subject: The Supreme Court protected health care. They can take it away.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e61ad/51dbcc2a/4d9f5f2/3a4843b/730030637/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Six years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that the Affordable Care Act is constitutional.

Today, the ACA, along with all of the progress and protection it represents, is under attack.

Republicans in Congress have tried to repeal the ACA countless times, and recent attempts failed by just one vote. Combine that with the Supreme Court vacancy left by Justice Kennedy's retirement, and whether or not the ACA exists this time next year depends on the outcome of November's election.

**_[Defend Bob Casey -- who has always fought for affordable health care with both fists up -- by donating $5 or whatever you can right now.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") If Democrats take back the Senate, ACA repeal through Congress will be off the table, and they'll be able to push back against President Trump's most extreme Supreme Court nominees. But if we fail, one way or another, the ACA is gone. No more protections for people with pre-existing conditions. No more lifetime caps on coverage. No more guaranteed no-copay birth control.

**_[There is far too much at stake to leave anything to chance: do whatever you can to protect Democrats' chance at a Senate majority.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") Bob is running against Congressman Lou Barletta, who likes to say that, if he has been in the Senate last year, the ACA would have been repealed. He is right. Bob is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. We can't risk losing him.

**Bob has a big fundraising deadline on Saturday, and another $4,900 to raise today to meet his goal. What can you chip in to help out?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180628_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

But if we fail, one way or another, the ACA is gone. No more protections for people with pre-existing conditions. No more lifetime caps on coverage. No more guaranteed no-copay birth control. "" "" Bob is running against Congressman Lou Barletta, who likes to say that, if he has been in the Senate last year, the ACA would have been repealed. He is right. Bob is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. We can't risk losing him. Bob has a big fundraising deadline on Saturday, and another $4,900 to raise today to meet his goal. What can you chip in to help out? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Todd Prieb
subject: You Deserve To Know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
During the primary, J.D. said many times, “No candidate will work harder than me, and no candidate will have more fun than me.” That attitude has been a part of all that we do here at Team Scholten and, as a result, our entire campaign has been a little different.
Campaigns often talk about their end-of-month or end-of-quarter goals—and then celebrate after hitting their goal. But, you almost never hear what that goal really was, or how much they actually raised. So, in the spirit of doing things a little differently, we’re putting it all on the table and being transparent about our end-of-quarter goal. Our fundraising has been a bit slower than expected this quarter, so we set an ambitious goal of raising **$50,000** online over the last ten days of the quarter (June 21-June 30). Here’s an ActBlue screenshot of where we were yesterday afternoon:
As you can see, we’re not quite where we need to be to hit the mark. And, as we’ve said in the past, these aren’t arbitrary goals we pull out of thin air. **This is where we need to be to run the campaign it will take to beat Steve King.**
So, here’s the part where we ask for your help. [**_Please consider contributing today to help us reach our goal to dethrone Steve King!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520878/8196015/-1176716808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjU2M2FkOS0zNjdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ztllRbc6ep3gfB_3Pe-miJUOjLXTOpk_MbGN-pLmF8=)
Your support is crucial to helping us end the embarrassment of Steve King in Iowa, and we sincerely appreciate you being a part of this movement.
Thank you,
Todd Prieb
Political Director
Scholten4Iowa
P.S. Our fundraising quarter ends at midnight on Saturday, June 30th, and we’ll send an email the next day with another screenshot showing exactly how we did in hitting our goal. **Click the button below to help!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1520879/8196016/-1176716808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjU2M2FkOS0zNjdiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ztllRbc6ep3gfB_3Pe-miJUOjLXTOpk_MbGN-pLmF8=)

body:

Almost immediately after Justice Kennedy announced his resignation, Donald Trump confirmed that his Supreme Court nominee would come from a list of judges who have all pledged to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- putting a woman's right to choose at risk.

Donald Trump's nominee will cement a far-right, conservative majority on the Supreme Court for decades, so we need a firewall of Democratic governors who are prepared to fight back and protect women's rights.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: in less than 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
It's been a tough week folks, so let's end on a high note by sending all the help we can to Jacky, Beto, and the eventual Democratic nominee in Arizona. Can we hit $5,000 by Saturday's | |
---
Wow! In less than 48 hours, **you have driven more than $2,300 in grassroots donations to help flip the Senate!** [It's been a tough week folks, so let's end on a high note by sending all the help we can to Jacky, Beto, and the eventual Democratic nominee in Arizona. Can we hit $5,000 by Saturday's end-of-quarter deadline? Every dollar counts.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92d6/5486deaa/282f5bdb/dcc7599/700407483/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_senatecontrol?refcode=em20180628_senkick_30&amount=25") [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92d6/5486deaa/282f5bdb/dcc7598/700407483/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_senatecontrol?refcode=em20180628_senkick_30&amount=20") I'm proud to stand with you! Let's do this. \-- Tim

Folks, The lone swing vote on the United States Supreme Court, Justice Anthony Kennedy, just announced his retirement. **The stakes for Democratic control of the Senate have never been higher. EVERYTHING -- from health care to voting rights to reproductive freedom -- is on the line.** Republicans hold a two-seat majority in the Senate. Three of our best chances to pick up Senate seats in November are in Arizona, Nevada, and Texas. # Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

body:
If Democrats want to stop the Trump administration from doing things like ripping families apart at the border, we're going to have to take back both the House and the Senate. ------------------------

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, even before he won the Republican primary, Corey Stewart pledged to run a "vicious" campaign against Tim.

These kinds of attacks don't just hurt Tim's re-election campaign. [They also hurt Democratic candidates all the way down the ballot.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aee8/3189913027/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+They+also+hurt+Democratic+candidates+all&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")

If Democrats want to stop the Trump administration from doing things like ripping families apart at the border, we're going to have to take back both the House and the Senate.

**We have to make sure our team on the ground has the resources they need to help Democrats win up and down the ticket. Here are ways you can help:**
* **Show our opponent we aren 't taking anything for granted.**
Corey Stewart says he can win this race because Democrats don't care about winning Virginia.
[Chip in $5 to show you're with us >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aeef/3189913027/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+5+to+show+yoursquore+with+usnbsp&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")

* **Make sure we have organizers in every corner of the Commonwealth.**
[Chip in $25 to help open a new field office >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aeee/3189913027/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+to+help+open+a+new+field+offi&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")

* **Fight back against attacks on Democratic candidates.**
Our opponents are as extreme as it gets - and they're going after our values.
[Chip in $50 to help us make ads that defend our values >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aeed/3189913027/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+50+to+help+us+make+ads+that+defe&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")

* **Win back the House and the Senate.**
Taking back Congress is impossible without your help.
[Chip in $100 to make a major investment in the 2018 race >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aeec/3189913027/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+100+to+make+a+major+investment+i&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")

In order to stay on track and win in November, we've set a goal to raise $200,000 in grassroots donations before the end of June. We're almost there, **but we still need $12,100 before the books close at[midnight on Saturday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ab/3e0906/68e4d52f/3e35aee3/3189913027/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+midnight+on+Saturday&utm_campaign=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld&source=20180628_3_FR_TEAM_EOQ-money-allocation_all-ld")**

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: FWD: [Supreme Court] Flipping the Senate has never been more critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4111/24c69fd9/1927f31a3/1883be71/1633545725/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact&source=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact")
---

Peter,

We're still reeling from yesterday's news that Justice Anthony Kennedy is stepping down from the Supreme Court.

His retirement gives President Trump yet another chance to fill a spot on the highest court with an anti-choice extremist.

There is so much on the line: Abortion rights. Health care. Voting rights. Immigrants' rights. LGBTQ rights.

There's one crucial way we fight back: electing the two pro-choice Democratic women we've endorsed to help flip the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees. We must win.

**Donate $3 now to help flip the Senate and protect our rights:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Our-Rights](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4111/24c69fd9/1927f31a3/1883be72/1633545725/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_KennedyRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectOurRights&utm_campaign=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact&source=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact")**

Thank you,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

_\----------Original Message----------
From: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
Date: Wed, Jun 27, 2018 at 7:29 p.m._

Peter,

Today, we received some devastating news from the Supreme Court:

Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, giving Donald Trump the opportunity to nominate another anti-choice Supreme Court justice.

The stakes could not be higher. This individual will have the power to repeal _Roe v. Wade_ -- endangering the lives of tens of millions of American women, jeopardizing our health care, and undermining our rights.

We've endorsed two women, **Jacky Rosen** (NV) and **Kyrsten Sinema** (AZ), who can flip the two seats we need to take back the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees. We have to win.

**Donate $3 now to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate and defend the right to choose:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Our-Rights](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4111/24c69fd9/1927f31a3/1883be73/1633545725/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_KennedyRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectOurRights&utm_campaign=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact&source=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4111/24c69fd9/1927f31a3/1883be6c/1633545725/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_KennedyRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact&source=WQEFER86N_digital_email_20180628_KennedyRRkick_inact")

Donate $3 now to help flip the Senate and protect our rights: "" Thank you, Christina Reynolds Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List \----------Original Message---------- From: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List Date: Wed, Jun 27, 2018 at 7:29 p.m. Peter, Today, we received some devastating news from the Supreme Court: Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, giving Donald Trump the opportunity to nominate another anti-choice Supreme Court justice. The stakes could not be higher. This individual will have the power to repeal Roe v. Wade -- endangering the lives of tens of millions of American women, jeopardizing our health care, and undermining our rights. We've endorsed two women, Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ), who can flip the two seats we need to take back the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees. We have to win. Donate $3 now to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate and defend the right to choose: "" Thank you, Stephanie Schriock President, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We cannot stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump is hoping we'll forget about the families he's separated.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78eff/2f5ea88d/701885bb/2cbc1d20/16636036/VEsH/ "http://eoaclk.com/zPbQKFqMk2/?utm_source=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-2-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, First of all, I want to thank you. Thank you for your calls, your signatures, and your donations. Each time you've answered a call to action, you've proven that the progressive movement is strong. Last week showed the importance of your efforts more than ever: It was YOUR public outcry that led President Trump to fold like a cheap suit and sign an executive order to scale back family separation at the border. Make no mistake -- that executive order does not clean up the chaos and destruction he created with his immoral immigration policies. But it shows that when we all stand together and speak in one voice he cannot ignore us. Last week also proved something else: **We cannot stop now.** There are still almost 2,000 kids out there who were forcibly separated from their peaceful asylum-seeking parents, and are held in detention centers across the country. That's why we just sued the Trump administration -- we cannot stop the moral fight for our country's future. We must press on. So today, I'm asking you to support the progressive movement we're building. We must all act together, to keep this administration in check, to keep lifting up the voices of the oppressed. Your donations NOW count more than ever. [**So can you chip in a few bucks before our June 30 deadline on Saturday?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78eff/2f5ea88d/701885bb/2cbc1d27/16636036/VEsE/ "http://eoaclk.com/0mJc07tCEq/?utm_source=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-2-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") | [YES, I'M READY »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78eff/2f5ea88d/701885bb/2cbc1d26/16636036/VEsF/ "http://eoaclk.com/lY0WBPZZkc/?utm_source=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-2-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
---
We're at a pivotal moment, friend. Trump and his administration are hoping we'll be distracted by the next news cycle and move on from the horrors of his family separation policy. We cannot stop now -- we MUST demand action and spend every day he's in office holding Donald Trump accountable for his failed, immoral leadership.
This isn't going to happen unless we all work together. I need you by my side as we lead this progressive movement together and stop Trump from rolling back our values. [**Can I count on you before midnight on June 30?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78eff/2f5ea88d/701885bb/2cbc1d25/16636036/VEsC/ "http://eoaclk.com/Tc2QBoE2tn/?utm_source=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-2-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78eff/2f5ea88d/701885bb/2cbc1d24/16636036/VEsD/ "http://eoaclk.com/seBVeWfs2i/?utm_source=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-06-28_eom-2-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-2-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")

| This Saturday at midnight will be a make-or-break moment: our most important quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the election year.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I'm a "prime Republican target"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I won't be able to win this race without your help. I have to defend my record when my opponents are spending millions of dollars on attack ads. |
---

| | **Here 's my take, Peter: I won't be able to win this race without your help.** I have to defend my record when my opponents are spending millions of dollars on attack ads. So I need to ask you: **[Will you pitch in toward our first end-of-quarter goal of the general election and give me the resources I need to set the record straight and beat Republican Rep. Mike Braun in November?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e0d/7377f838/3cf669e2/51f9ceb0/3201405150/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-doublematch?refcode=20180628.2nd&amount=10")**

Indiana's Senate race will be one of the most expensive in the country. _Bloomberg_ just called me a **"prime Republican target,"** and Karl Rove's and Mitch McConnell's super PACs are already spending millions to replace me with a GOP rubber stamp.

So we have to make a statement this quarter. Everyone is going to be comparing our numbers to Rep. Braun's to determine whether we have a fighting chance. And we already know his numbers will be HUGE -- after all, he has President Trump, Vice President Pence, and Mitch McConnell on his side.

The good news is we don't have to match his millions -- we just have to post a competitive finance report before we close our books on Saturday night. That's why we're **double matching all donations** before the deadline to make sure we hit our $40,000 online goal -- **will you chip in and show the world that we can WIN in November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
